description: RLHF mimick weights across 10 candidate-scoring parameters. Initial uniform; updated after each epoch by rlhf_weight_updater.py via simple gradient on score(survivor) - score(rejected). Weights sum to 1.0 to keep composite_score in [0,1].

parameter_descriptions.atom_quality_score: Technical mechanism present, no filler words (0-1).
parameter_descriptions.novelty_score: Inverse of arXiv hit count in 24 months on the candidate's joint topic (0-1).
parameter_descriptions.cross_source_diversity: 1.0 if atom A and atom B are from different SOURCE types (essay vs blog vs transcript vs arXiv).
parameter_descriptions.mechanism_coherence: Vocabulary overlap on mechanism words across the atoms (0-1).
parameter_descriptions.saturation_distance: Semantic distance from cluster centroid of known niches (RLHF, JEPA, MoE, RAG, SAE etc.) (0-1).
parameter_descriptions.arxiv_grounding: Count of arXiv citations supporting the candidate's sub-claims, normalized.
parameter_descriptions.community_density: 1.0 - normalized recent paper count on the joint topic; high is GOOD.
parameter_descriptions.cross_disciplinary_bonus: 1.0 if atoms span ML + non-ML domain; 0 otherwise.
